LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, FOR A JUDGMENT OF $116,650.86 AGAINST DEFENDANTS MARTIN A. SCHAINBAUM, INC., A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AND MARTIN A. SCHAINBAUM IS GRANTED. THERE IS NO TRIABLE ISSUE AS TO ANY MATERIAL FACT THAT THE DEFENDANTS ENTERED INTO A LOAN AGREEMENT WITH WELLS FARGO, DEFAULTED ON PAYMENTS AND TO THIS DATE, HAVE FAILED TO PAY THE ACCELERATED FULL BALANCE DUE ON THE LINE OF CREDIT ACCOUNT. IT IS IRRELEVANT THAT WELLS FARGO DID NOT PROVIDE ACCOUNT STATEMENTS FROM JULY 16, 1996 TO JANUARY 18, 2008 BECAUSE WELLS FARGO DOES PROVIDE ACCOUNT STATEMENTS FOR 3/24/2010 TO 5/24/2016 (EXHIBIT 3) AND FOR 4/24/2017 TO 5/22/2017 (EXHIBIT 4), WHICH DEMONSTRATES THE ACCOUNT HISTORY FOR THE RELEVANT TIME PERIODS. WELLS FARGO PROVIDED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT IT LOANED DEFENDANTS A LINE OF CREDIT, THE DEFENDANTS DEFAULTED ON PAYMENT, WHEREUPON WELLS FARGO CLOSED THE DEFENDANTS' ACCOUNT AND REQUESTED FOR THE PAYMENT OF THE FULL REMAINING BALANCE. WELLS FARGO'S EVIDENCE CLEARLY PROVES THAT THE AMOUNT DUE AS OF OCTOBER 30, 2017 IS $116,650.86. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLENE P. KIESSELBACH: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER, CSR NO. 6576, E-MAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-15-2017 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Yvonne Ramirez-Browning of Wells Fargo & Co. Office of the General Counsel (626-965-9465) appears by telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Martin A. Schainbaum of the law offices of Martin A. Schainbaum (415-777-1040) appears as self-represented counsel and counsel for defendants/opposing parties

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, for a judgment of $116,650.86 against defendants Martin A. Schainbaum, Inc., a Professional Law Corporation and Martin A. Schainbaum is granted. There is no triable issue as to any material fact that the defendants entered into a loan agreement with Wells Fargo, defaulted on payments and to this date, have failed to pay the accelerated full balance due on the Line of Credit account. It is irrelevant that Wells Fargo did not provide account statements from July 16, 1996 to January 18, 2008 because Wells Fargo does provide account statements for 3/24/2010 to 5/24/2016 (Exhibit 3) and for 4/24/2017 to 5/22/2017 (Exhibit 4), which demonstrates the account history for the relevant time periods. Wells Fargo provided sufficient evidence showing that it loaned defendants a line of credit, the defendants defaulted on payment, whereupon Wells Fargo closed the defendants' account and requested for the payment of the full remaining balance. Wells Fargo's evidence clearly proves that the amount due as of October 30, 2017 is $116,650.86. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
